title: ludwigia adscendens subsp. adscendens
intro: Ludwigia adscendens subsp. adscendens, also known as water wisteria or Chinese water wisteria, is a type of aquatic plant native to China and Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The health benefits of Ludwigia adscendens subsp. adscendens include reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease, improving digestion, and acting as an antimicrobial agent. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in tea or decoction form, and it can also be dried and used as an herbal powder or capsule.
